title: The Art of Star Wars Episode V: The Empire Strikes Back
content:
{{Top|rwm|leg|ref|italics=1}} {{ReferenceBook |image=[[File:Art_of_Empire.jpg]] |title=''The Art of Star Wars Episode V:
The Empire Strikes Back'' |author=[[Vic Bulluck]], [[Valerie Hoffman]] and [[Mark Cotta Vaz]] |cover artist= |illustrator=N/A |editor=[[Deborah Call]] |publisher=[[Del Rey]] |release date=[[October]] [[1980]] {{C|Original}}''[[The Art of Star Wars Episode V: The Empire Strikes Back]]'' |type=Hardcover, Softcover |pages=192 |dimensions=11.9 × 9.1 × 0.5 inches |weight=1.8 pounds |isbn=0345410882 |series= |preceded by= |followed by= }} '''''The Art of Star Wars Episode V: The Empire Strikes Back''''' is a book featuring art created during the production of [[Star Wars: Episode V The Empire Strikes Back|''Star Wars'': Episode V ''The Empire Strikes Back'']]. Originally published in [[1980]] as "'''''The Art of The Empire Strikes Back'''''", the book was reissued in [[1994]] with the expanded title, and updated in [[1997]] to include material from [[The Star Wars Trilogy Special Edition|the Special Edition]]. ==Publisher's summary== The Art of Star Wars: The Empire Strikes Back ''is a magnificent full-color celebration of the amazing artistic and technical accomplishments in the second chapter of the most spectacular space epic of all time. Lavishly illustrated with production sketches, production paintings, costume designs, construction drawings, matte paintings, storyboards and stills, and complete with biographies of the outstanding artists and technicians who created the film, ''The Art of Star Wars: The Empire Strikes Back'' is an indispensable volume for fans and special effects buffs alike.'' ''This volume includes:'' *''The complex stop-motion animation technique used for the tauntaun, the beast Luke rode on the frozen planet Hoth''. *''The design and animation techniques used in the creation of the immense Imperial walkers''. *''The evolution of the character Yoda''. *''Enthralling matte paintings that bring Cloud City to life.'' *''16 pages of illustrations and photographs from the new footage added to the Special Edition films!'' [[File:Art_of_Empire_Pl.jpg|thumb|left|150px|Polish ''Gwiezdne Wojny Epizod V: Imperium kontratakuje Album'']] ==Sources== {{Mediacat|from=1|imagecat=Images from The Art of Star Wars Episode V: The Empire Strikes Back}} *''[[The Jedi Master's Quizbook]]'' *''[[The Secrets of Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{ArtOf}} {{Interlang |de=The Art of Star Wars: Episode V – Das Imperium schlägt zurück |ja=アート・オブ・スター・ウォーズ 帝国の逆襲≪特別篇≫ |ka=ვარსკვლავური ომები, ეპიზოდი V: იმპერიის საპასუხო შეტევა: მხატვრობა |pl=Imperium kontratakuje (album) |sr=The Art of Star Wars Episode V: The Empire Strikes Back }} {{DEFAULTSORT:Art of Star Wars Episode V: The Empire Strikes Back}} [[Category:Legends art books|Episode V]]
